articles.title: INSTAGRAM IS NOW ALLOWING USERS TO PROMOTE STORIES AS ADS
articles.summary: Advertisers and users are now able to seamlessly promote their image and/or video media from Instagram Stories as ads via the Instagram Marketing API.

articles.title: INSTAGRAM IS TESTING 10 MINUTE LONG REELS
articles.summary: Instagram is internally testing the ability to create Reels that are up to 10 minutes in length, which would align the product with TikTok.

articles.title: HOW TO USE AI TO FIND THE GAPS IN YOUR MESSAGING
articles.summary: Overlooked holes in your messaging could cause a trust gap for potential customers. To avoid this, ask ChatGPT to review your website copy and identify gaps. You can use the same tactic on competitor sites.

articles.title: 20+ FREE SCRIPTS FOR AUTOMATING MARKETING TASKS
articles.summary: This repository contains a collection of automations and experiments related to social media, SEO, and PR. Their use cases include customized AI analysis of TikTok videos, news media monitoring and clustering, and persona motivation research.

articles.title: MOBILE APP LANDING PAGE EXAMPLES
articles.summary: Almost 60% of web traffic is mobile, so a great mobile app landing page is essential. This article analyzes desktop and mobile examples from Shopify, Squarespace, Pumble, Staffbase, and Dynamic Yield.

articles.title: VAN LEEUWEN AND THE ART OF NOT ADVERTISING
articles.summary: This ice cream brand was able to grow significantly without any ad spend. Brands can emulate its success by investing in standout packaging, both physical and digital. Additionally, companies can launch meaningful partnerships or invest in PR, promotions, and events, ideally at a local level.

articles.title: THE INTERSECTION OF LUXURY AND SPORTS
articles.summary: More luxury brands are leveraging sports culture to create connections with broader audiences. Collaborations like Adidas X Gucci blur the lines between high society and everyday culture, extending an invitation to diverse communities to experience luxury on their terms. This strategy led to a 27% increase in brand engagement from younger demographics.

articles.title: WHAT DOES YOUR BRAND STAND FOR?
articles.summary: A brand is the promise that a company makes combined with the experience customers have.
